data.title: First Brands Group starts wind down of Brake Parts Inc., Cardone, and Autolite units in North America. Assessing transition options.
data.description: A prominent automotive parts supplier, First Brands Group, LLC, based in Rochester Hills, Michigan, has recently disclosed the start of winding down specific business operations in North America. This includes well-known brands like Brake Parts Inc., Cardone, and Autolite. The company is actively working to transition these units to new ownership while its other business segments remain operational. First Brands Group, LLC is focusing on evaluating various options for the future following a thorough assessment in recent months.

data.description: PEPE experienced a daily gain of 3.33%, however, it is currently facing bearish MACD signals. Technical analysis indicates a neutral RSI of 44.09. The meme coin is approaching key resistance levels in its trend.

data.title: Gray showcasing design-build expertise at the 2026 IPPE in Atlanta, will engage with customers and partners in the industry.
data.description: In anticipation of the 2026 International Production & Processing Expo (IPPE) in Atlanta, the global protein and food processing industry is gearing up to convene for the event. data.title: InMode's stock soars on rumored $1.1B takeover bid by foreign fund, hitting three-month high. via Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: An analyst suggested that a foreign investment fund may acquire the medical aesthetics outlet InMode for a staggering $1.1 billion. This speculation caused a surge in InMode's stock on Monday, propelling it to a three-month high. This potential takeover offer has attracted significant attention and interest in the market.

data.title: Inventor from Indianapolis develops 2 STEP exerciser for full body workout. (SGM-608) - PITTSBURGH, Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: On January 26, 2026 in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Indianapolis, Indiana, shared their creation of the 2 STEP exercise equipment. The inventor expressed the idea behind the product, aiming to provide a means to work out the core, upper body, and lower body all with one piece of equipment. The innovative design of the 2 STEP allows users to participate in a range of exercises targeting different muscle groups efficiently. This invention marks a new approach to fitness equipment, consolidating multiple workout benefits into a single apparatus.

data.title: UPS likely to report Q4 earnings at $2.2/share, down from $2.75/share; revenue expected at $24.01B vs $25.3B last year. UPS stock fell 1.2%.
data.description: United Parcel Service, Inc. will announce fourth-quarter earnings on January 27 before the market opens. Analysts predict earnings of $2.2 per share, a decrease from $2.75 per share last year. Revenue is anticipated to be $24.01 billion, down from $25.3 billion in the previous year. In the third quarter, UPS surpassed expectations and provided fourth-quarter sales guidance exceeding estimates. The company's stock price closed at $107.98, decreasing by 1.2% on Friday. For further details and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

data.title: Senate crypto bill markup postponed by snowstorm, may face partisan vote with "99% chance" of no Dem support. DC expected to clear snow by Thursday.
data.description: Snow removal in Washington D.C. is likely to be completed by Thursday, according to a Senate source. However, it is highly unlikely that the bill will garner any support from the Democratic party, with a predicted 99% chance of no backing from them.

data.title: OptiTrack unveils 260 X-Series cameras with 26 MP resolution and ±0.050 mm 3D accuracy. Max ranges: 40m passively, 91m actively.
data.description: OptiTrack, a prominent player in 3D optical tracking systems, has introduced the 260 X-Series camera family, designed to provide its most precise tracking capabilities in challenging, wide-ranging settings. The Primeˣ and Slimˣ 260 models offer ±0.050 mm 3D accuracy (equivalent to 50 microns) along with a 26 Megapixel sensor, ensuring stable tracking within extensive capture areas. These cameras support passive ranges of up to 40 meters and active tracking ranges of up to 91 meters. The enhanced pixel density contributes towards improved tracking performance.

data.title: 75% will switch to a competitor if a website feels unsafe, Liferay survey finds. 1,000 US adults surveyed.
data.description: In Los Angeles, recent research conducted by Liferay, a top provider of Digital Experience Platforms (DXPs), has unveiled some concerning statistics about online user behavior. The 2026 Liferay Broken Trust Report, released in December 2025, shows that a staggering 75% of users are likely to leave a website if they perceive it as unsafe or notice any unusual behavior. This study involved surveying 1,000 American adults aged 18 and above, representing various regions and demographics. The data highlights the significant impact of minor inconsistencies on user trust and loyalty, with many individuals opting to switch to a competitor's site to accomplish the same task.

data.title: CA Tax council warns against ghost tax preparer scams promising large refunds. Beware of unsigned returns. False preparers on the rise yearly.
data.description: The California Tax Education Council (CTEC) issued a warning about being cautious of individuals promising significant tax refunds and preparing tax returns without signing them. This alert comes from Sacramento, California on January 26, 2026. Annually, a fresh group of "ghost tax preparers" surface, advertising inexpensive fees and the promise of substantial refunds, but disappear once the tax deadline expires. It is important for taxpayers to stay vigilant against such offers to prevent potential fraud.

data.title: Illinois Democratic leaders to host fundraiser and 55th birthday celebration for Speaker Welch on Feb. 6 in Chicago.
data.description: On February 6, 2026, Illinois Democratic leaders are organizing a special birthday event for Emanuel "Chris" Welch, the Speaker of the Illinois House and candidate for the 7th District State Central Committeeperson. The celebration will be a Harlem Renaissance-themed evening to mark this milestone occasion for Welch.
